task_completion.description: Verify that the agent logged into OpenMaint and navigated to the Work Orders section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint web interface is visible in the browser, showing the dashboard or a list of work orders.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-001 is updated with the correct billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint UI, the Notes field for WO-BILL-001 contains the text 'BILLING_CODE: FIN-900' and the record is saved.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-002 is updated with the correct billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint UI, the Notes field for WO-BILL-002 contains the text 'BILLING_CODE: IT-550' and the record is saved.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-003 is updated with the correct default billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint UI, the Notes field for WO-BILL-003 contains the text 'BILLING_CODE: GEN-000' and the record is saved.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-004 is updated with the correct billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint UI, the Notes field for WO-BILL-004 contains the text 'BILLING_CODE: HR-200' and the record is saved.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-006 is updated with the correct billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint UI, the Notes field for WO-BILL-006 contains the text 'BILLING_CODE: EXEC-100' and the record is saved.

task_completion.description: Verify WO-BILL-005 was correctly skipped due to the 'Warranty' exception.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of 'BILLING_CODE' being added to the Notes field of WO-BILL-005. The agent may view it but must leave it unmodified.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the OpenMaint web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser open to OpenMaint, with the agent clicking edit, typing in the Notes field, and saving, rather than using API calls or terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Check that the agent opened or read the billing_code_map.csv file to find the mappings.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a command like 'cat /home/ga/Desktop/billing_code_map.csv', or a text editor/spreadsheet application displaying the CSV contents.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not use scripts or direct database queries to solve the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., psql) or python scripts executing database updates for the work orders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct billing codes to append to the 'Notes' field for each work order are: WO-BILL-001: FIN-900, WO-BILL-002: IT-550, WO-BILL-003: GEN-000 (default code for unmapped location), WO-BILL-004: HR-200, WO-BILL-006: EXEC-100. Work order WO-BILL-005 must be skipped (no modifications) because its description contains the word 'Warranty'.
